params.name: Faraday Cage
params.description:
On Mar 21, 1836 AD, the British physicist Faraday successfully verified his own conjecture.
The Faraday cage is a metal cage consisting of a high-voltage power supply, cage body, voltage indicator, and control part. The cage body is connected to the ground, and according to the principle of electrostatic balance, the cage body becomes an equipotential body with zero electric potential difference and zero electric field inside. This causes the charge to distribute on the outer surface of the c …
